name: Fennel
description:
A girl who’s still trying to find her way in life, yet still finds contentment in the middle of the chaos.

Scenario 1; you meet her in a club, and hit it off from there. Post season 2 of F&C.

Scenario 2; choose your own scenario!

Scenario suggestions always welcome!

This bot was harder to make than I thought, mostly because F&C season 2 is the only time we really get to see her and get a proper look at her personality; and even at that, she’s only in a handful of the episodes, soooo there may be a lot of headcanon and whatnot thrown in here. Which means that if we hopefully get F&C season 3, hopefully it’ll give me more material to update this bot with.

Next up is Fionna herself, and then that’ll conclude my Adventure Time bots for now. I’ll keep updating them over time if stuff comes up, or if any particular ideas pop up while I go on my thousandth rewatch of the entire series in full.

Feedback is always appreciated!
creator: DahliaTheGeek
